title: Bare Knuckles
writer: A. Channing Edington, James P. Hogan
actors: William Russell, Mary Thurman, Correan Kirkham
plot: Tim McGuire, renowned as "The Brute" in the San Francisco underworld, has an adopted family including his boyhood friend Abie and a former professor and his daughter. When he rescues a visitor, Lorraine Metcalf, from a gang of hoo...
